docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY LOH, IVAN AS TO DEFENDANT ESPOSITO, MARCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOH, IVAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPOSITO, MARCO $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $27.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,027.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SEND TO THE COURT A COPY OF THE FRONT AND BACK OF THE CHECK PAID TO THE PLAINTIFF. UNTIL THIS DATE NO COPY WAS SENT TO THE COURT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF LOH, IVAN
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ESPOSITO, MARCO
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION FORM RETURNED. ON JUNE 10, 2004 IT WAS LEFT BY THE DEFT WITH INSTRUCTION TO PROCESS AFTER THE INSURANCE COMPANY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGEMENT SUGMITTED TO COURT FOR APPROVAL.
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGEMENT DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. COPY OF DENIAL SENT TO DEFT.
CERTIFIED MAILING TO MARCO ESPOSITO RETURNED SIGNED.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $757.76 FILED BY ESPOSITO, MARCO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LOH, IVAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ESPOSITO, MARCO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LOH, IVAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
